creator: acm@FreeBSD.org
text: Hello. I have updated wazuh to 4.7.5. I tested it on 14.x and it runs without openssl issues. Also, I fixed some build/installation issues with wazuh-manager on aarch64. Btw 4.8.0 include some breaking changes (new bundle libraries, python updated to 3.10, openssl updated to 3.x, lot of wazuh-dashboards changes, etc) and it can take me a time before I commit it to ports tree. Thanks for your PR
